headline: Q4 Earnings Outperformers: Diamondback Energy (NASDAQ:FANG) And The Rest Of The U.S. Shale E&P Stocks
summary: As the Q4 earnings season comes to a close, it’s time to take stock of this quarter’s best and worst performers in the U.S. shale E&P industry, including Diamondback Energy (NASDAQ:FANG) and its peers.

headline: Diamondback Energy Inc (FANG) Expands Production in Midland and Delaware Basins
summary: Diamondback Energy Inc (NASDAQ:FANG) is among the must-buy non-tech stocks to invest in now.
